data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for an audit trail of who was exported and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate its implementation or operational status, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the audit trail requirement.
